problem: Verification: Tier 4 Fallback Test - Test that tier 4 org endpoint fallback resolves correctly.

files.why: E2E test example using Playwright; shows test pattern for API integration testing with page.request API
Integration test example; demonstrates test infrastructure and patterns
Lists test scripts: test (vitest run), test:e2e (playwright test); also specifies dev/build/lint commands
Playwright configuration; defines webServer and test settings for e2e tests

facts.claim: next-js-boilerplate has E2E test infrastructure via Playwright
facts.evidence: playwright.config.ts exists, tests/e2e/ directory contains Counter.e2e.ts, I18n.e2e.ts, Sanity.check.e2e.ts, Visual.e2e.ts; package.json includes @playwright/test ^1.58.2 and test:e2e script

facts.claim: next-js-boilerplate has unit/integration test infrastructure via Vitest
facts.evidence: tests/integration/Counter.spec.ts uses Playwright test harness; package.json includes vitest ^4.1.0; test script runs 'vitest run'

facts.claim: API endpoints are defined in example-server Express routes
facts.evidence: example-server/src/routes/ contains: auth.ts, call.ts, contacts.ts, groups.ts, messages.ts, notifications.ts, optimize.ts, permissions.ts, projects.ts, steps.ts, subprojects.ts, words.ts; routes-api.ts coordinates routing

facts.claim: example-client makes API calls via fetch with VITE_API_URL configuration
facts.evidence: src/api/client.ts reads 'import.meta.env.VITE_API_URL || http://localhost:3000/api'; src/api/optimize.ts uses API_BASE constant; .env file exists

facts.claim: No explicit 'tier 4 org endpoint fallback' implementation found in source code
facts.evidence: Grep searches for 'tier', 'Tier', 'fallback', 'Fallback' in non-node_modules TS files returned: only Sentry config 'org' param in next.config.ts, playwright 'fallback' in comments, AddressInput 'fallback' in google places logic, callService 'fallback' in IVR logic - no tier/fallback logic related to API endpoint resolution or org-specific routing

facts.claim: example-server uses Prisma ORM for database operations
facts.evidence: package.json lists @prisma/client ^6.6.0 and prisma ^6.6.0; src/lib/prisma.ts exists; Prisma schema files expected in standard location

unknowns.question: What does 'tier 4 org endpoint fallback' refer to?
unknowns.context: Ticket asks to test this feature, but no explicit implementation found. Could be: (a) endpoint selection based on organization tier level, (b) fallback to alternate API endpoint when primary fails, (c) tiered API access/rate limiting, or (d) feature not yet implemented. Needs clarification.

unknowns.question: Which repository(ies) contain the tier 4 implementation?
unknowns.context: Ticket is multi-repo but description doesn't specify scope. example-server has API routes; example-client makes API calls; next-js-boilerplate may have integration tests. Unclear which owns the fallback logic.

unknowns.question: Is there a Prisma schema file documenting data model for organizations/tiers?
unknowns.context: Prisma usage detected but schema file not located. This would clarify whether org tiers are modeled in database.

unknowns.question: What is the expected fallback behavior?
unknowns.context: Should fallback happen at: (a) client API call level, (b) server endpoint resolution level, (c) database query level, or (d) external service call level? No documentation found.

entryPoints.description: Express server entry point; registers middleware and routes
Central routing file that mounts all route handlers
Request wrapper that constructs API calls; uses VITE_API_URL env var
Playwright e2e tests; entry point for browser-based API testing

executionSignals.output: Runs tsx watch src/index.ts on port (env configured)
Runs Playwright tests; launches webServer defined in playwright.config.ts
